Use the same number of steps across all KSampler nodes.

For KSampler Low Noise, set "End at Step" to half of the total steps.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values:
contrast, underlighting, short-side composition, mid-night time, mixed colors, close-up shot, high angle shot, Visible shafts of light streaming through particles, often from sunlight filtering through gaps. cool colors. In a dimly lit ancient ruined crystal cave. godray and dust particle. A beautiful dark elf warrior girl stands panting, hand on chest, With each inhale and exhale, her bikini-clad chest ripples heaves and her stomach contracts to catch her breath, then releases again, revealing her firm solid abs.
engraved string bikini. Luxurious silver jewelry adorns her arms and wrists.
The camera then descends vertically while gradually tilting upward, shifting into a low-angle view close to her chin, and finally presenting a low-angle close-up of her hips.
Her skin is a deep black. Her hair is a silver-colored with bangs. She wears an ornate obsidian headpiece. Her skin gleams with beads of sweat. huge size chest. Her firm, bare abs are visible. Her waist is slender. Her big thighs are thick and muscular. Her ears are pointed. Her dark elven noble tattoos are prominent. very long legs.She wears a sapphire necklace. 
Instagirl.

Intense bright light and deep dark shadow contrast.

nodes.title: BATCH PROMPT. PROMPT PER LINE
widgets_values:
A neon fox running through a rainy cyberpunk alley at night, reflections glowing on wet pavement, camera follows in slow motion
A tiny astronaut surfing on a giant ocean wave made of stars, glowing galaxies swirling in the background
A girl in a red dress dancing in a blooming flower field during golden hour, petals floating in the air
A robotic hummingbird hovering over a metallic rose, light rays glinting off the petals, camera slowly orbiting
A samurai standing in falling cherry blossoms, drawing the sword as wind blows dramatically through his robe
A baby panda sliding down a bamboo shoot in slow motion, sunlight flickering through the leaves
A glowing crystal floating above a dark forest floor, energy waves pulsing outward as the camera zooms in
A futuristic motorcycle speeding across a desert highway at sunset, sand blowing past in orange light
A painter’s brush creating a rainbow city skyline on a floating canvas, paint transforming into real buildings
A massive whale swimming gracefully through the clouds, birds flying alongside, camera tilts upward
A girl opening a book in a dark room, glowing butterflies emerging and lighting up her face
A ninja leaping from rooftop to rooftop under the full moon, cloak rippling in the wind
A spaceship emerging from a black hole surrounded by electric storms, camera rotates dramatically
A glass of coffee filling itself, cream swirling into mesmerizing fractal patterns, macro close-up motion
A vintage car driving through a tunnel of glowing mushrooms, camera tracking from the front bumper
A dancer spinning inside a giant bubble floating over a mirror lake, reflections rippling beneath
A robotic cat chasing a laser beam across a futuristic apartment, holograms flickering around
A fantasy castle rising from the sea as waves crash and seagulls scatter, cinematic tilt-up motion
A close-up of an eye reflecting an exploding supernova, the pupil dilates as light fills the frame
A clock tower melting in surreal Dalí-style motion while clouds drift backward in time-lapse
